coverage: 1801-1991 historical faction seed; modern 1991-2026 handled by power_age_factions_addendum.zip
methodology: Faction labels are period-specific research hypotheses.
Do not compare faction_id labels mechanically across regimes; compare faction_type instead.
Use confidence thresholds and sensitivity checks.
One person may belong to several factions simultaneously.
recommended_join_strategy: Append historical CSV rows into existing factions/person_factions/faction_relations/elite_edges, skipping duplicate IDs where appropriate.
caution: This is a seed dataset for visualization and model development, not an academic-grade final dataset.
